message:
Command `# Verify DRT is still running and provide final status
ps -p 824793 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime 2>/dev/null
echo ""
grep "Completing\|Start [0-9]*th\|Total wire.*um\|0 DRC" /tmp/librelane_final.log | tail -5
echo ""
echo "Sustained monitor log:"
cat /tmp/sustained_drt.log 2>/dev/null | head -5` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "# Verify DRT is still running and provide final status
ps -p 824793 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime 2>/dev/null
echo ""
grep "Completing\|Start [0-9]*th\|Total wire.*um\|0 DRC" /tmp/librelane_final.log | tail -5
echo ""
echo "Sustained monitor log:"
cat /tmp/sustained_drt.log 2>/dev/null | head -5", "timeout": 10}
function.name: execute_bash

extras.command:
# Verify DRT is still running and provide final status
ps -p 824793 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime 2>/dev/null
echo ""
grep "Completing\|Start [0-9]*th\|Total wire.*um\|0 DRC" /tmp/librelane_final.log | tail -5
